title: adicea trichosanthes
intro: Adicea trichosanthes, also known as the five-angle fruit or snake gourd, is a type of vining plant native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Adicea trichosanthes include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function, while its herbal preparations include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from its leaves, roots, and fruits. In traditional medicine, Adicea trichosanthes is often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and skin infections.
